title: Crepidomanes aphlebioides
taxonomy: Crepidomanes aphlebioides is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This family is commonly known as the filmy fern family. The Hymenophyllaceae family is a part of the larger group known as the Polypodiales, which is a subgroup of the leptosporangiate ferns. The Polypodiales is further classified under the division Pteridophyta and the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Crepidomanes aphlebioides reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.

intro: Crepidomanes aphlebioides, also known as a type of fern, is a species of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Research has shown that this plant possesses several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Crepidomanes aphlebioides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
